nasb.text: But they, righteous men, will judge them with the judgment of adulteresses and with the judgment of women who shed blood, because they are adulteresses and blood is on their hands.

esv.text: But righteous men shall pass judgment on them with the sentence of adulteresses, and with the sentence of women who shed blood, because they are adulteresses, and blood is on their hands.”

cnv.text: 然而必有義人判她們受淫婦和流人血的婦人所受的刑罰，因為她們是淫婦，她們手中染血。

ccb.text: 她们是双手沾满血腥的淫妇，必有义人按她们应得的报应审判她们。’
